name: fincenter-telegram-full-sync
description: FinCenter Telegram bot + Express API + Firebase Admin sync

scripts.start: echo BOOTSTRAP_START && npm install --omit=dev && node bootstrap-firebase-admin.js && echo BOOTSTRAP_DONE && node http-wrapper.js
scripts.check: node --check index.js && node --check finance-bot.js && node --check http-wrapper.js && node --check bootstrap-firebase-admin.js
